---
title: "Edward Harold Spender"
---

## Edward Harold Spender

**Dates:** (1864-1926)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1896,7)

### Biography

He was the son of Lily Spender and the father of Sir Stephen Spender, the poet.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
